results.rendered_html:
tāḍa (von taḍ)
1〉 adj. schlagend: ghaṇṭātāḍo 'ruṇodaye  M. 10,33 .
— 2〉 m.
a〉 parox. Schlag  H. an. 2,119 .  MED. ḍ. 14 . norasi tāḍamā ghnate  AV. 19,32,2 .
— b〉 Laut, Geräusch.
— c〉 eine Handvoll Gras u. s. w.  H. an.   MED. 
— d〉 Berg  H. an. 
— e〉 eine Grasart, = devatāḍa  WILS.  — tāḍī s. u. tāḍi.

results.rendered_html:
tāḍa a. [taḍ bhāve ac] Beating, striking.
— ḍaḥ
1 A blow, knock, thumb, whipping, chastisement.
2 Noise, sound.
3 A sheaf.
4 A mountain.
Comp.
— gha a. beating with a whip or strokes of any kind.
— ghaḥ, -ghātaḥ an artificer who beats or hammers, a smith.
